final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original marketing poster (Xiaohongshu / RedNote 9-grid cover image) for a grassroots content creator account called "小书素人媒体", featuring the DJI Pocket 4 camera.

Style/medium: Xiaohongshu (小红书) ugc-influencer flat editorial style, warm and approachable, hand-crafted feel with cute kawaii typography touches, differentiated from generic tech review aesthetics
Composition: vertical 9-grid cover layout (3×3 tile-friendly single frame), product DJI Pocket 4 prominently displayed in center-lower zone, title text anchored in the center band, generous breathing room around elements
Subject: DJI Pocket 4 handheld camera as hero product, styled casually as if held or placed by a real person (grassroots / 素人 vibe), no overly polished studio setup
Scene/backdrop: soft pastel or warm neutral background suggesting a cozy lifestyle setting — desk, fabric, or flat-lay surface; no busy environment
Lighting/mood: soft diffused natural light, warm and inviting, low contrast, friendly and relatable mood
Color palette: warm cream or blush as base, DJI Pocket 4 device color as accent anchor, one pop color (coral or mint) for title text contrast
Text (verbatim): "大强pocket4初体验" as the central headline; "小书素人媒体" as sub-brand label
Constraints: title text "大强pocket4初体验" must use a cute, rounded, playful display typeface — visually differentiated from standard sans-serif tech fonts; layout must remain readable when tiled as a 9-grid cover on Xiaohongshu
Avoid: cold tech-magazine aesthetic, harsh studio lighting, generic white background product shot, corporate font styles, watermarks, clutter
